emails.subject: SoCal Gas CPUC Proceeding
emails.body: SoCal Gas CPUC Proceeding Attached is a draft of the letter that we propose to send to the CPUC regarding the AL2837 proceeding in which SoCal Gas is proposing changes to its "windowing" criteria. Your comments would be greatly appreciated. We need to file this tomorrow, so please communicate any comments to me by the close of business today, if possible. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Gas CPUC Proceeding
emails.body: RE: SoCal Gas CPUC Proceeding I'm a little nervous actually commenting that we have Shipper imbalances. Here are my comments. To: Donoho, Lindy; Hass, Glen; Blair, Lynn; Harris, Steven; Kowalke, Terry; Lokey, Teb; Kilmer III, Robert; Watson, Kimberly; Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Gas CPUC Proceeding
emails.body: Your comments look fine. Let's wait and see if anyone else has any comments. To: Rapp, Bill; Hass, Glen; Blair, Lynn; Harris, Steven; Kowalke, Terry; Lokey, Teb; Kilmer III, Robert; Watson, Kimberly; Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK
